description_long: This is a modern, armless sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a medium gray fabric. The seat and backrest are both thick and well-cushioned, forming a continuous, seamless surface with no visible separation between seat and back. The sofa stands on two wide, angled metal sled legs, which provide stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The backrest is tall and straight, offering substantial support, while the absence of armrests gives the piece a compact and open appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with a subtle, fine fabric texture, and the overall form is geometric and clean-lined. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or modern parks.
description: A modern, armless gray sofa with thick, continuous cushions and angled metal sled legs, featuring a minimalist and open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, seamless seat and backrest, with both metal legs visible and no armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's thick cushioning and the angled profile of the metal sled leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall, straight backrest and the back sides of the metal legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the sofa's depth and the sled leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushion, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; sides are open and flush with the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: Two wide, angled metal sled legs positioned at the front and rear corners, exposed and finished in a dark metallic color.
attribute_backrest_type: Tall, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation or decorative features, matching the seat in thickness and upholstery.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle, fine texture and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
